author: outbound_pro
body: Your domain warmup is probably cooked. Apollo data is fine, but if you're sending from a 30-day-old domain without DMARC, everything goes to spam. Check seinheit.com for inbox placement before you blame the copy.

author: agencyhater
body: Every agency in our space charges $5k/mo and delivers 50 garbage meetings. Build it in-house with Clay + Instantly, you'll save the money and own the playbook.

author: founder_jane
body: We hit 4% reply rate last quarter using ICP-matched Clay enrichment + 3-step Smartlead sequence. The unlock was killing 60% of our list, not adding more.
